messages.content:
(Bullet points on answers only) 5 U3C1L1 V3

Logistics is the branch of military science dealing with

A) logical assignment of command and staff roles and responsibles

B) movement of supplies, equipment, and personnel

C) procedures that define the communication channels in a battalion

D) ordering supplies, equipment, and personnel

6. U3C1L1:09

What are the two channels of information within a command?

A) Command channels and unit channels

B) Control channels and staff channels

C) Staff channels and subordinate channels

D) Command channels and staff channels

7 U3C1L1:Q8

is the authority that a commander lawfully exercises over subordinates by virtue of rank or assignment.

A) Rank

B) Grade

C) Command

D) Superiority

8 U3C1L3:F1

The commander's role in planning should be more directive when

A) there is little time to accomplish the mission

B) the tasks are recurring

C) the staff fails to gather information

D) the staff is focused and experienced

5) B) movement of supplies, equipment, and personnel

6) D) Command channels and staff channels

7) C) Command

8) A) there is little time to accomplish the mission

U3C1L3.03

Bill's team is working on a school fundraiser. He's reading an After Action Review (AAR) from last year. Where is he in the planning process?

A) Identify the task

B) Gather information

C) Implement and assess the plan

10 U3C1L3 Q2

Tammy is working on a Flow Map and resource list for a project. Where is she in the planning process?

A) Develop solutions

B) Develop the plan

C) Implement and assess the plan

11 U3C1L3 V2

is a list of established actions to carrying out a given task.

A) Stock operational procedure

B) Standard operating process

C) Standard operating procedure

D) Stock operating process

12 U3C1L3 V1

A Memorandum of Instruction (MOI) is a written document that

A) instructs team members about how to improve their performance

B) details the specifics of a project or mission

C) describes the roles of staff in a project or mission

9) B) Gather information

10) B) Develop the plan

11) C) Standard operating procedure

12) B) details the specifics of a project or mission

13 UICYLA: 07

TeTee PA breing the team leader is the only person who speaks in the prese

A True

8) Fase

54

The first step in continuous improvement is is

A) identify the problem

B) gather information about a problem

C) continuously evaluate performance

D) decide what needs improvement

15 U3C1L4 Q2

Tor F: Continuous improvement is a process that is only used in the military and JROTC

A) True

B) False

16 U3C1L4:03

The product of your continuous improvement process is a(n)

A) documented plan

B) written critique of the performance of individual team members

C) service learning plan

D) academic success plan

13) B) False

14) A) identify the problem

15) B) False

16) A) documented plan

Developing solutions is part of solutions, & is important to the continuous improvement process. When you develop possible

A) collaborate with others outside of your team

B) brainstorm with your team members

C) criticize solutions that are not workabile D) judge all solutions with an open mind

18 U3C1L4 06

The Aller Action Fieview document should compare what you planned to accomplish in your Continuous Improvement Plan with

A) what you actually accomplished

6) the problem addressed by the plan

C) how individual team members performed

D) what you communicated to your Battalion

19 U3C1L4 V2

The act of working together is

A) continuous improvement

B) collaboration

C) mitigation

D) socialization

20 U3C1L4 V1

is the process of certifying that all requirements of a school, curriculum, etc, have been

met

A) Collaboration

B) Certification

C) Accreditation

D) Requirementation

17) B) brainstorm with your team members

18) A) what you actually accomplished

19) B) collaboration

20) C) Accreditation

When you atterryt to meolve an ethical dilemma, which of the following is NOT a question you should ask yourself?

A) What are the consequences of my decision?

Bi What are my opmons?

C) Cant live with my decision?

O) How will this benefit me?

22

Tor F: As a leader, you should get your subordinates to comply with your own political beliefs

Al True

B) False

23 U3C1L8:V1

An ethical dilemma involves situations where you choose from

A) two or more options that are not fully ethical

B) two options where anly one is ethical

C) two or more options where you can only live with one decision

D) two options that support your values

U3C1L6:V2 24.

ANAn situation is one based on an imagined example or conjecture

A) hypothetical

B) hypocritical

C) ethical

D) unethical

21) D) How will this benefit me?

22) B) False

23) A) two or more options that are not fully ethical

24) A) hypothetical

Ethical leadership in JROTC is supported by the Army Leadership Model and

A) adherence to the Golden Rule

B) religious training

C) Seven Army Values

D) seven decision-making steps

26 U3C1L7.Q3

A platoon leader lets one member of his group take shortcuts on a service project. The leader's behavior as a supervisor could lead to lower standards on future projects and

A) impair group cohesion

B) increase the leader's populanty with the group

C) improve discipline with other members of the group

D) build trust with the favored team member

27. U3C1L7:04

You are a company commander. Your first sergeant told you that she thinks that one of your platoon leaders over-supervises his squad leaders. If your first sergeant is correct, which of the following would you expect to see in the platoon over time?

A) improved performance

B) low confidence and independence in platoon members

C) better team cohesion

D) poor discipline among platoon members

28. U3C1L7 V2

Remediating is a supervisory skill that involves

A) coaching and mentoring

B) disciplining

C) solving problems

D) correcting a flaw or mistake

25) C) Seven Army Values

26) A) impair group cohesion

27) B) low confidence and independence in platoon members

28) D) correcting a flaw or mistake

A Magire

Coach and mentor

C) Clarity the goals for the quad

De are made

20

There are four post secondary options with a military association. Which one does not belang on the list below?

A) Mitary enlistment

B) AmeriCorps

C) Reserve Officers Training Corps

D) Service Academies

31 U3C2L1:04

What official documents includes a record of your high school coursework?

A) GPA

B) Grade Cards

C) College Applications

D) Transcript

32 U3C2L1:01

Which of the following statements is not true of a community college?

A) They often tailor their programs to the needs of local employers

B) They are often less expensive than four-year colleges

C) They do not allow for part-time enrollment

D) They often have open-admissions

29) B) Coach and mentor

30) B) AmeriCorps

31) D) Transcript

32) C) They do not allow for part-time enrollment

The process to apply to college is also known as the process

A) scholarship

B) deletion

C) admissions

D) entrance

34 U3C2L1 VS

Government financial aid that you do not have to repay is called a

A) scholarship

B) grant

C) loan

D) trust

35. U3C2L1 V7

The cost for living and food while attending college is and

A) grant, loan

B) free clear

C) admissions, tuition

D) room, board

36 U3C2L1:V11

is the fee for college instruction

A) Admissions

B) Tuition

C) Board

D) Transcript

33) C) admissions

34) B) grant

35) D) room, board

36) B) Tuition

One of the basic admission requirements for college is that you must have an

A) Accredited High School Technical diploma

B) ACT score, GED

C). Accredited High School diploma, GED

D) Advanced Placemerit, GED

38 U3C212 05

Several guys have made plans to play basketball after school and then get a pizza You should arrive norme at 8:00 or 9:00 pm You do have a big project due tomorrow and you're not even half-finished with it. Your goal was to get an A on that project. What do you need to do?

A) Set a goal that you'll stay up all night to get the project done. You don't want to miss out on time with your friend

B) Remember that your priority was to finish the course well and get an A on this project. You'll have to tell the guys "not this time.

C) Take a risk and turn the project in late.

D) Get up early the next morning to finish the project and turn it in incomplete if you have to

39. U3C2L2 V4

What are you doing when you can do more than one thing at a time successfully?

A) Planning

B) Hurrying

C) Multitasking

D) Procrastinating

37) C) Accredited High School diploma, GED

38) B) Remember that your priority was to finish the course well and get an A on this project. You'll have to tell the guys "not this time."

39) C) Multitasking

What is procrastination?

A) To have children

B) The act of putting off something that needs to be done

C) The act of anticipating what might need to be done and doing it

D) The act of planning for an unknowable or uncertain future

41

U3C2L2 Q6

If you take a 15-credit hour course load in college, you'll spend about 15 hours a week in the classroom. With a course load like that how many hours should you plan for studying and doing homework each week?

A) You should spend about an hour a week on homework for each course

you are taking B) If you take a 15-credit hour class load, expect to spend about 15 hours a week studying and doing homework

C) Plan on spending about 30 hours a week studying and doing homework

D) There is no rule of thumb. Studying in college is not that necessary.

42 U3C2L2 V1

Professional career training that is sometimes paid and similar to an apprenticeship for skilled trades is called

A) time management

B) career training

C) an internship

D) a part time job

40) B) The act of putting off something that needs to be done

41) C) Plan on spending about 30 hours a week studying and doing homework

42) C) an internship

What is the definition of the word "time management">

A) Keeping control of your time in a way that best enables you to achieve your goals according to your priorities

B) The act of putting off something that needs to be done

C) Activities that do not promote the effective use of time

D) A list or program of activities that need to be done or considered

44

U3C2L2.09

A classmate said, "It seems like you do a lot of extra work filling out your planner Why?"

What should you say to make her understand the purpose of time management?

A) Because it helps me accomplish more by being organized and motivated to reach my goals.

B) Because it helps me keep track of things I still need to do

C) Because if I don't use a planner, then I won't reach my goals

D) Because I am so unorganized. I have to use a planner.

45 U3C2L2 V5

When you determine the order for dealing with a series of items, activities, or tasks according to their importance to a goal or value, you are

A) planning

B) multitasking

C) procrastinating

D) prioritizing

43) A) Keeping control of your time in a way that best enables you to achieve your goals according to your priorities

44) A) Because it helps me accomplish more by being organized and motivated to reach my goals.

45) D) prioritizing

Which of the following statements is a responsibility of a platoon sergeant?

A) Conduct inspections of the platoon at formations

B) Keep the company commander apprised of the status of the platoon at all times

C) Assume control of the platoon in the absence of the platoon leader

D) All of the choices

47 U3C3L1 Q1

Which of the following statements is a responsibility of a platoon leader?

A) Keep the company executive officer apprised of the status of the platoon at all times.

B) Organize and maintain an effective chain of command and use it to accomplish tasks, work mainly through the platoon sergeant and squad leaders

C) Know all Cadet regulations and ensure that members of the platoon also know and follow them.

D) All of the choices

48 U3C3L1 V1

Choose the definition for the word below.

"correction"

A) To cancel

B) To set right

C) To hinder

D) To delay

46) D) All of the choices

47) D) All of the choices

48) B) To set right

Choose the definition for the word below

"supervise"

A) Training that corrects, molds, or perfects moral character

B) To cause to know something, or to know how

C) To have the charge and direction of, to oversee

D) To gather information for decision making

50 U3C6L1 V1

Choose the goal that best matches the definition below

"A goal that streamlines the day-to-day activities of the tactical plan using a high level of detail

A) Operational

B) Tactical

C) Strategic

51. U3C6L1 V2

Choose the goal that best matches the definition below.

"These goals paint a picture of the desired future and long-term goals of the organization aligned with its mission"

A) Operational

B) Tactical

C) Strategic

49) C) To have the charge and direction of, to oversee

50) A) Operational

51) C) Strategic

These goals support strategic plane by translating them viso measuratte objectives that indiciale now the strategies will be implemented

A) Operational

B) Tactical

C) Strategic

53 U3C6L1 01

Select the proper order of determining goals

A) Strategic, operational tactical

B) Tactical, strategic, operational

C) Strategic tactical, operational

D) It does not matter as long as you do them all

52) B) Tactical

53) C) Strategic, tactical, operational
